{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Lowgold course
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Lowgold course]] is shrouded in an orange cloud to obscure obstacles.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
